message:
prompt: delegate test writing to adversarial test-writer subagent

Instead of the model writing its own tests (confirmation bias), the TDD
section now instructs it to spawn a test-writer subagent that writes
adversarial tests assuming the implementer will cut corners. The model
then implements against tests it didn't write.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
